item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Pernyataan bahwa "kepentingan sosial harus utama" bisa menimbulkan konflik jika tidak disertai pertimbangan terhadap kebebasan individu.

notes: Agent A opens in support of society-priority but with a balance caveat, then shifts toward Agent B's rights-and-balance framing by turns 3 and 5. Agent B consistently opposes unchecked collective priority while acknowledging communal well-being.
